name: results_page_id
label: Results page ID
hint: Portal page ID used for search results.

name: input_placeholder
label: Input placeholder
default_value: Finn artikler, bestillingsskjema eller nyheter fra ett søk.

name: button_label
label: Button label
hint: Label used for the search submit button.

name: compact_mode
label: Compact mode
hint: Render a compact search input without the greeting, intended for header/navigation use.
